pages.title: 0-10 minutes
pages.text: Get wood, craft the wooden stave, then practice only $(l)心$() and $(l)命$(). The goal is not memorization; it is reliable casting.

pages.title: 10-30 minutes
pages.text: Use $(l)明$() or $(l)脉$() before entering caves. Add $(l)忍$() before fights. If you are forced to stand your ground, add $(l)稳$() or $(l)坚$().

pages.title: 30-60 minutes
pages.text: Use $(l)入$() for supplies and momentum. When your stave is full, prepare survival glyphs, write $(l)劫$(), clear the challenge, then upgrade the stave.
